stock_photos.alt_text: Neon retro arcade space invaders game with glowing neon lights and digital aesthetic
stock_photos.relevance: Perfect retro arcade neon aesthetic matches Invadors theme
stock_photos.notes: High contrast neon styling evokes classic arcade cabinets

stock_photos.alt_text: Abstract colorful numbered tiles and geometric shapes representing number puzzle game
stock_photos.relevance: Geometric patterns and number focus align with 2048 puzzle mechanics
stock_photos.notes: Clean, modern aesthetic with emphasis on numbers and grids

stock_photos.alt_text: Bird in flight against bright blue sky with motion and dynamic energy
stock_photos.relevance: Captures dynamic bird motion and open sky perfectly matching Flappy Bird essence
stock_photos.notes: Vibrant sky colors with bird as central focus creates action feeling

stock_photos.alt_text: Green neon grid pattern with retro arcade gaming aesthetic and digital display
stock_photos.relevance: Green color palette and grid-based pattern perfect for Snake game nostalgia
stock_photos.notes: Retro green phosphor screen aesthetic instantly recognizable to Snake players

stock_photos.alt_text: Vibrant colorful geometric blocks and patterns stacked in puzzle formation
stock_photos.relevance: Bright colored blocks and stacking pattern directly mirrors Tetris gameplay
stock_photos.notes: Rainbow color spectrum captures iconic Tetris visual identity

stock_photos.alt_text: Soccer ball in action on green field with dynamic motion and sports intensity
stock_photos.relevance: Classic soccer action shot perfect for sports-themed game promotional image
stock_photos.notes: Green field and ball provide immediate sports context and energy

integration_guide.overview: Six high-quality stock images optimized for game website. All images are free for commercial use with CC0 license.
preparation_steps: Download each image at full resolution from provided URLs
Recommended: Optimize for web (compress to 150-200KB per image)
Use provided alt text for accessibility and SEO
Store in website /images/games/ directory with standardized naming
seo_metadata: Include alt text in all img tags
Add title attributes for additional context
Use structured data (schema.org) for images if desired
Maintain consistent aspect ratio (1.5:1) across game pages
integration_guide.attribution: All images from Unsplash (unsplash.com) - Free for commercial use under CC0 license. No attribution required but appreciated.

quality_assessment.relevance_score: 9/10 - Each image directly matches game theme and mechanics
quality_assessment.commercial_license: ✓ CC0 license permits commercial use without restrictions
quality_assessment.visual_consistency: ✓ Cohesive modern aesthetic across all six images
quality_assessment.accessibility: ✓ Descriptive alt text provided for all images

next_steps: 1. Download all 6 images using provided URLs
2. Optimize images for web (recommended: 150-200KB per image)
3. Store in /images/games/ directory with provided naming convention
4. Update HTML templates with provided img tags and alt text
6. Monitor load times and implement lazy loading if needed
